item.name: Sunforged Crystal
item.description: When invoked, this fiery crystal calls forth your blistering sunforged to your side.

mount.name: Sunforged
mount.action: Summon forth your sunforged. Its searing flames consume all─with the exception of its owner, thankfully.
mount.description: A product of the genius mind of Hephaistos, this fiery phantom creation combines two concepts─a flying snake and an immortal bird─and can shapeshift as the situation demands. Only the individual it recognizes as its master may ride it unscathed.
mount.tooltip:
It tastes like burning...
- Hapless Boy
